arts.ttl: Premier League technology update delay explained as Liverpool and Everton watch on
arts.sum: The Premier League was set to introduce semi-automated offside technology this season, but that has now been pushed back until further notice

arts.ttl: Can Everton upset Liverpool in last Merseyside derby at Goodison Park?
arts.sum: Everton have one last league game vs. Liverpool at Goodison. Can they get one final win over their neighbours before they leave their spiritual home?

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho responds to Pep Guardiola with savage 115 charges dig after Liverpool salute
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola took an unprovoked swipe at rival Jose Mourinho this week and now the ex-Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham manager has responded in brutal fashion

arts.ttl: 'Because of him': Alexis Mac Allister says he's made change in Liverpool training because of Mo Salah
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is not only one of Liverpool’s best players, he’s one of the Reds’ most influential players. Indeed, Salah is arguably Liverpool’s best player,...

arts.ttl: ‘Best atmosphere’: £40m Arne Slot target says he was blown away by Liverpool fans last season
arts.sum: Liverpool may soon be in the market for a new left-back. Andrew Robertson isn’t getting any younger, and Robertson has been criticised for his performances...

arts.ttl: Liverpool begin search for “like-for-like” replacement as senior star’s time is ending
arts.sum: Liverpool are believed to be in the market for a new left-back as Andy Robertson looks like he is coming towards the end of his time at Anfield. The Scotland captain has been with the Merseyside club since completing a bargain £10m switch from Hull City back in 2017 and was very influential during the […] The post Liverpool begin search for “like-for-like” replacement as senior star’s time is ending appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak: Scotland's present, Liverpool's future
arts.sum: That day, he played in two seven-a-side matches against two different Accies sides and scored nine goals. Ten years ago, a nine-year-old Ben Doak was playing for Ayr United’s U11s against Hamilton Academicals.

arts.ttl: Liverpool legend Steven Gerrard makes six-word vow after Al-Ettifaq sacking
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Steven Gerrard is under increasing pressure at Al Ettifaq after a poor run of form in the Saudi Pro League, with the former Reds captain demanding more from his players

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain chief issues fresh update on Mohamed Salah amid Liverpool contract claim
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah will become a free agent next summer should Liverpool and the forward fail to agree a contract extension

arts.ttl: Everton new stadium 'flooding' fears eased after footage goes viral
arts.sum: Images of heavy rain entering the concourse of the new stadium have gone viral online
